svg.title: Bamboard device in its 3D-printed case, screen lit, on a desk
svg.desc: Studio render of the assembled Bamboard: light PETG enclosure with a slim 3 mm bezel and chamfered front edge, 4.3 inch IPS touch screen showing the v0.17 Live dashboard (progress ring, camera thumbnail, Pause/Stop/speed controls, chamber light, fan readout, six-tab bar), an integrated desk-stand tab tilting it back 15 degrees, and a USB-C cable trailing off the right side.
